all_cells_feasible: feasible numerically on 19-common but N=32 pool ~80 extreme-clinical (MJ-1 population confound)
BLOCKER_fixed_hours_not_enforced: loader enforces per-subject cap at WHOLE-RECORDING granularity -> at high N the tiny cap (0.05h) < one recording -> actual total hours BALLOONS (N=32:116h, N=1024:305h, N=2000:597h != 100h) -> 'fixed-hours' axis silently confounded with TOTAL hours. MUST FIX: window-level budget truncation (cap_windows=cap*120, truncate within recording).
MAJOR_sparse_exposure: N=2000 -> ~6 windows/subject (3 min); N=1024 -> ~12; likely too little for from-scratch encoder to learn per-subject structure -> high-N cells may be under-trained artifacts not diversity effects. Needs pretraining-convergence check per cell + possibly cap the high-N end.
subject_contribution_balanced_by_manifes: window-level cap = equal windows/subject per cell (Gini~0 by construction; verify at run)
compute_budget_ok: 15 runs from-scratch @100h corpus (pilot-scale); epochs TBD by convergence check
launch_note: HOLD - BLOCKERS_PRESENT. BL-1 (identifiability) requires PM decision on the fix axis. BL-2/BL-3 + MJ-1..5 + numeric thresholds must be resolved before launch. Loader fixed-hours bug FIXED. This is the FSR-8C identifiability lesson caught BEFORE any GPU spend.

blockers.BL1_not_identifiable: fixed-H0 single line: exposure=100/N PERFECTLY collinear with N (corr=-1) -> exposure covariate VOID -> one fused slope (diversity-exposure), diversity NOT estimable. FIX: PM choose (a) 2 fixed-H0 lines {100,200}h ~2x compute, or (b) constant-exposure growing-hours arm, or (c) reframe to 'subject-vs-depth tradeoff frontier' (no diversity claim)
blockers.BL2_underpower_selection_bias: 100h from-scratch may be weak -> most cells fail 0.58 gate -> N-dependent gating = survivorship bias. FIX: positive-control floor (beat random-init frozen), per-cell convergence gate, gate-as-outcome (slopes with+without gated cells)
blockers.BL3_thresholds_not_prereg: Gini/MDE/seed-SD have NO NUMBERS. FIX: freeze numeric MDE/Gini/seed-SD before launch

majors.MJ1_population_confound: feasibility was on full 33ch corpus; on 19-common N=32 draws ~80 EXTREME long-recording clinical (epilepsy) patients vs N=2000 general -> N confounds diversity/exposure/POPULATION. FIX: 19-common feasibility (done) + report population drift or restrict to common eligibility pool (caps max N)
majors.MJ2_pretrain_val_not_fixed: pin ONE fixed common pretrain-val set (constant subj+exposure)
majors.MJ4_sparse_redundancy: N=2000 ~6 contiguous windows/subj = near-duplicates -> effective diversity <<6; report effective-windows + pin overlap policy
majors.MJ5_seeds_conflated: factor subset-seed x init-seed; >=5 seeds at N{32,2000}

loader_fixed_hours_bug: FIXED (window-level budget; verified total ~100h all N; was 116-597h)
